mapper.select: SELECT uc.user_challenge_id AS userChallengeId, uc.user_id AS userId, uc.challenge_id AS challengeId, uc.start_date AS startDate, uc.end_date AS endDate, uc.status, uc.giveup_at AS giveupAt, uc.rejoin_available_at AS rejoinAvailableAt, u.nickname AS nickname FROM user_challenge uc JOIN user u ON uc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.challenge_id = #{challengeId} ORDER BY uc.user_challenge_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT user_challenge_id AS userChallengeId, user_id AS userId, challenge_id AS challengeId, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, status, giveup_at AS giveupAt, rejoin_available_at AS rejoinAvailableAt FROM user_challenge WHERE user_challenge_id = #{userChallengeId}

SELECT uc.user_challenge_id AS userChallengeId, uc.user_id AS userId, uc.challenge_id AS challengeId, uc.start_date AS startDate, uc.end_date AS endDate, uc.status,
c.mode_type AS modeType, c.title AS title, c.category AS category, c.description AS description, c.period_days AS periodDays, c.difficulty AS difficulty, c.max_participants AS maxParticipants,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_challenge uc2 WHERE uc2.challenge_id = c.challenge_id AND uc2.status = 'PROGRESS') AS currentParticipants,
u.nickname AS nickname FROM user_challenge uc JOIN challenge c ON uc.challenge_id = c.challenge_id JOIN user u ON uc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND c.mode_type = #{modeType} AND uc.status = 'PROGRESS' ORDER BY uc.start_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_challenge SET status = #{status}, end_date = CASE WHEN #{status} != 'PROGRESS' THEN CURRENT_DATE() ELSE end_date END, giveup_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'GIVEUP' THEN NOW() ELSE giveup_at END, rejoin_available_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'GIVEUP' THEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) ELSE rejoin_available_at END WHERE user_challenge_id = #{userChallengeId}

UPDATE user_challenge SET status = 'PROGRESS', start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = NULL, giveup_at = NULL, rejoin_available_at = NULL WHERE user_challenge_id = #{userChallengeId} AND status = 'GIVEUP'
mapper.select: SELECT user_challenge_id AS userChallengeId, user_id AS userId, challenge_id AS challengeId, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, status FROM user_challenge WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_challenge ( user_id, challenge_id, start_date, end_date, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{challengeId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status} )
